sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ نَجَاةُ قِطَّتَهَا الضَّائِعَةَ بَعْدَ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ.
sentences.translation: Najat je pronašla svoju izgubljenu mačku nakon tri dana.
sentences.translationEn: Najat found her lost cat after three days.

sentences.translation: Mačka je bila kod njihove starije komšinice.
sentences.translationEn: The cat was at their elderly neighbour's house.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْجَارَةُ: وَجَدْتُهَا أَمَامَ بَابِي وَأَطْعَمْتُهَا.
sentences.translation: Komšinica je rekla: Pronašla sam je pred mojim vratima i nahranila sam je.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbour said: I found her at my door and I fed her.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَتْ نَجَاةُ الْجَارَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ قَلْبِهَا.
sentences.translation: Najat je zahvalila komšinici iz sveg srca.
sentences.translationEn: Najat thanked the neighbour with all her heart.

sentences.translation: Uzela je mačku na ruke i sretna se vratila kući.
sentences.translationEn: She picked up the cat and went home happily.
